items.name: Nutella
items.description: Palačinka, vafle nebo crofle s nutellou a křupavou rýží Rice Krispies, přelité bohatou belgickou bílou čokoládou.
items.englishDescription: A delightful treat topped with Nutella and crispy Rice Krispies, drizzled with rich white Belgian chocolate. Available as crepe, waffle or croffle.

items.name: Kinder Ecstasy
items.description: Palačinka, vafle nebo crofle s jahodami, banánem, Kinder Bueno a nutellou, přelité mixem karamelové, bílé a tmavé belgické čokolády.
items.englishDescription: Strawberries, bananas, Kinder Bueno topped with Nutella and a mix of white, caramel and dark Belgian chocolate.

items.name: Berry Fairy 🧚‍♀️
items.description: Palačinka, vafle nebo crofle s jahodami, borůvkami a malinami s krémem, přelité bílou belgickou čokoládou, sypané křupavými ořechy, pistáciemi a karamelovou čokoládou.
items.englishDescription: Strawberries, blueberries and raspberries with creamy cream cheese, drizzled with white Belgian chocolate and topped with crunchy nuts, pistachios and caramel chocolate.

items.name: Sweet Affairs
items.description: Palačinka, vafle nebo crofle s banánem, jahodami a marshmallow s bílou a mléčnou čokoládou.
items.englishDescription: Banana, strawberries, marshmallow topped with a duo of milk and white chocolate drizzle.

items.name: Fluff Love
items.description: Marshmallows and chocolate drizzle on your choice of base.
items.englishDescription: Marshmallows and chocolate drizzle on your choice of base.

items.name: Maple Obsession
items.description: Walnuts, sweet maple syrup, icing sugar, butter and light whipped cream.
items.englishDescription: Walnuts, sweet maple syrup, icing sugar, butter and light whipped cream.

items.name: Lotus Delight
items.description: Crunchy Lotus Biscoff biscuits and creamy spread topped with a drizzle of sweet white Belgian chocolate.
items.englishDescription: Crunchy Lotus Biscoff biscuits and creamy spread topped with a drizzle of sweet white Belgian chocolate.

items.name: Classic
items.description: Creamy Belgian milk chocolate and crispy Rice Krispies, drizzled with luscious white Belgian chocolate.
items.englishDescription: Creamy Belgian milk chocolate and crispy Rice Krispies, drizzled with luscious white Belgian chocolate.

items.name: The Minimalist
items.description: Nutella, fresh strawberries, bananas, chopped nuts and Belgian white chocolate.
items.englishDescription: Nutella, fresh strawberries, bananas, chopped nuts and Belgian white chocolate.

items.name: All In
items.description: Milk, white and caramel Belgian chocolate, topped with crispy Rice Krispies, crumbled Oreo, chopped nuts and crunchy caramel pearls, drizzled with rich dark chocolate.
items.englishDescription: Milk, white and caramel Belgian chocolate, topped with crispy Rice Krispies, crumbled Oreo, chopped nuts and crunchy caramel pearls, drizzled with rich dark chocolate.

items.name: King Oreo 👑
items.description: Milk Belgian chocolate, topped with Oreo cookie crumbs and drizzled with white Belgian chocolate.
items.englishDescription: Milk Belgian chocolate, topped with Oreo cookie crumbs and drizzled with white Belgian chocolate.

items.name: Sweet Maple & Berry
items.description: Strawberry, raspberry, blueberry, maple syrup, icing sugar and whipped cream.
items.englishDescription: Strawberry, raspberry, blueberry, maple syrup, icing sugar and whipped cream.

items.name: Biscoff Paradise
items.description: Banana, brownie, creamy Biscoff spread, smooth Belgian chocolate and a delightful crunch from Biscoff.
items.englishDescription: Banana, brownie, creamy Biscoff spread, smooth Belgian chocolate and a delightful crunch from Biscoff.

items.name: Fruit's Rainbow
items.description: Pineapple, kiwi, strawberries and bananas, drizzled with milk Belgian chocolate, topped with caramelized chopped nuts and a finish of white, dark and caramel chocolate.
items.englishDescription: Pineapple, kiwi, strawberries and bananas, drizzled with milk Belgian chocolate, topped with caramelized chopped nuts and a finish of white, dark and caramel chocolate.

items.name: I ❤️ Choco Choo
items.description: Brownie bites, strawberries, bananas and dark chocolate mousse mixed with Rice Krispies and Oreo crumbs, topped with milk and creamy white chocolate.
items.englishDescription: Brownie bites, strawberries, bananas and dark chocolate mousse mixed with Rice Krispies and Oreo crumbs, topped with milk and creamy white chocolate.

items.name: Ice Cream Dream
items.description: Two scoops of ice cream (vanilla & chocolate), strawberry, banana and a mix of our Belgian milk, white, caramel and dark chocolate.
items.englishDescription: Two scoops of ice cream (vanilla & chocolate), strawberry, banana and a mix of our Belgian milk, white, caramel and dark chocolate.

items.name: Choco-tuccine (Crepe)
items.description: A crepe cut into fettuccine slices, topped with milk Belgian chocolate, salted caramel pearls and Rice Krispies, drizzled with caramel, white and dark chocolate. Served with vanilla ice cream.
items.englishDescription: A crepe cut into fettuccine slices, topped with milk Belgian chocolate, salted caramel pearls and Rice Krispies, drizzled with caramel, white and dark chocolate. Served with vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Crepe & Fruits Ribbon
items.description: A crepe cut into fettuccine slices, topped with strawberry, red fruits, chopped nuts, pistachio and white Belgian chocolate, drizzled with caramel chocolate. Served with vanilla ice cream.
items.englishDescription: A crepe cut into fettuccine slices, topped with strawberry, red fruits, chopped nuts, pistachio and white Belgian chocolate, drizzled with caramel chocolate. Served with vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Cheesy Pistachio
items.description: Your choice of base with cream cheese and strawberry, drizzled with milk chocolate and pistachio spread, topped with pistachio crumbs.
items.englishDescription: Your choice of base with cream cheese and strawberry, drizzled with milk chocolate and pistachio spread, topped with pistachio crumbs.

items.name: Viral Dubai Chocolate Crepe 🇦🇪
items.description: Filled with pistachio kunafa, topped with pistachio spread, milk Belgian chocolate and pistachio crumbs. Add vanilla pistachio ice cream for extra.
items.englishDescription: Filled with pistachio kunafa, topped with pistachio spread, milk Belgian chocolate and pistachio crumbs. Add vanilla pistachio ice cream for extra.

items.name: Strawberry Dubai Chocolate
items.description: A sweet fusion of strawberry, Dubai chocolate and pistachio in crepe, waffle or croffle form.
items.englishDescription: A sweet fusion of strawberry, Dubai chocolate and pistachio in crepe, waffle or croffle form.

items.name: Make Your Own Crepe ❤️
items.description: Customize your crepe with a variety of fresh ingredients and toppings.
items.englishDescription: Customize your crepe with a variety of fresh ingredients and toppings.

items.name: Make Your Own Waffle 💚
items.description: Build your own waffle exactly to your taste with our wide range of fresh ingredients and toppings.
items.englishDescription: Build your own waffle exactly to your taste with our wide range of fresh ingredients and toppings.

items.name: Make Your Own Croffle 💙
items.description: Create your own delicious croffle with your preferred fillings.
items.englishDescription: Create your own delicious croffle with your preferred fillings.

items.name: Banana Maki Rolls
items.description: Banana sushi rolls served with your choice of premium Belgian chocolate, drizzled with caramel, white and dark chocolate, sprinkled with mini chocolate crunchy pearls.
items.englishDescription: Banana sushi rolls served with your choice of premium Belgian chocolate, drizzled with caramel, white and dark chocolate, sprinkled with mini chocolate crunchy pearls.

items.name: Banana Strawberry Maki Rolls
items.description: Sweet crepe rolls filled with banana and strawberry, served with a Belgian chocolate dip, drizzled with caramel, white and dark chocolate, sprinkled with mini chocolate pearls.
items.englishDescription: Sweet crepe rolls filled with banana and strawberry, served with a Belgian chocolate dip, drizzled with caramel, white and dark chocolate, sprinkled with mini chocolate pearls.

items.name: Brownie Maki Rolls
items.description: Sweet crepe rolls filled with brownie bites, served with a Belgian chocolate dip and drizzled with caramel, white and dark chocolate. (Ice cream not included.)
items.englishDescription: Sweet crepe rolls filled with brownie bites, served with a Belgian chocolate dip and drizzled with caramel, white and dark chocolate. (Ice cream not included.)

items.name: Maki Rolls Mix
items.description: Sweet crepe rolls filled with a mix (banana & strawberry, Dubai chocolate & marshmallow, brownie bites). Served with a Belgian chocolate dip.
items.englishDescription: Sweet crepe rolls filled with a mix (banana & strawberry, Dubai chocolate & marshmallow, brownie bites). Served with a Belgian chocolate dip.

items.name: Krůtí a avokádový crofle
items.description: Křupavý crofle s plátky krůtí šunky a krémovým avokádem.
items.englishDescription: Sliced turkey and creamy avocado — a fresh and satisfying combination.

items.name: Tuňákový crofle
items.description: Křupavý crofle s jemnou tuňákovou směsí.
items.englishDescription: A crispy croffle with a delicate tuna mix.

items.name: Lososový crofle
items.description: Křupavý crofle s lososem.
items.englishDescription: Crispy croffle with smoked salmon.

items.name: Crofle s omeletou / sázenými vejci
items.description: Křupavý crofle s vejcem a topingy podle vašeho výběru: šunka, avokádo, rajče, ledový salát.
items.englishDescription: A croffle with home-made omelette or fried eggs and your choice of toppings: turkey, avocado, tomato, lettuce.

items.name: Avocado Croffle Toast
items.description: Warm crispy croffle topped with smashed avocado, tomato, lemon drizzle, salt & pepper. Add eggs, turkey or cheese.
items.englishDescription: Warm crispy croffle topped with smashed avocado, tomato, lemon drizzle, salt & pepper. Add eggs, turkey or cheese.

items.name: Cheesy Crepe
items.description: Savory crepe filled with melted cheese, drizzled with pistachio crumbs and honey.
items.englishDescription: Savory crepe filled with melted cheese, drizzled with pistachio crumbs and honey.

items.name: Cheesy Biscoff Crepe
items.description: Sweet crepe filled with mozzarella cheese topped with rich Biscoff spread.
items.englishDescription: Sweet crepe filled with mozzarella cheese topped with rich Biscoff spread.

items.name: Jahodový Dubai pohár
items.description: Pohár plný čerstvých jahod a pistáciového krému, prokládaný dubajskou čokoládou a sypaný drcenými pistáciemi. Zalité belgickou čokoládou s kopečkem vanilkové zmrzliny nebo šlehačkou.
items.englishDescription: Strawberries and pistachio spread, layered with Dubai chocolate and pistachio crumbs, your choice of chocolate, topped with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.

items.name: Chill Guy
items.description: Dva kopečky vanilkové zmrzliny s banánem, jahodami, sušenkami a krémem Lotus Biscoff, doplněné šlehačkou a přelité mléčnou belgickou čokoládou.
items.englishDescription: Two scoops of vanilla ice cream, banana, strawberry, Lotus Biscoff biscuit crunch and spread, whipped cream, drizzled with milk Belgian chocolate.

items.name: Cloud 9
items.description: Dva kopečky čokoládové zmrzliny s banánem, jahodami, kousky brownies a šlehačkou, přelité mléčnou belgickou čokoládou.
items.englishDescription: Two scoops of chocolate ice cream, banana, strawberry, brownie bites, whipped cream, drizzled with milk Belgian chocolate.

items.name: Jahody & čokoláda
items.description: Miska čerstvých jahod zalitá belgickou čokoládou podle výběru, doplněná kopečkem zmrzliny.
items.englishDescription: A mix of strawberries and your choice of chocolate, topped with a scoop of your choice of ice cream.

items.name: Berry-Cream
items.description: Strawberry and vanilla ice cream, red fruits, strawberry coulis, pistachios, caramelized nuts and whipped cream, drizzled with white Belgian chocolate.
items.englishDescription: Strawberry and vanilla ice cream, red fruits, strawberry coulis, pistachios, caramelized nuts and whipped cream, drizzled with white Belgian chocolate.

items.name: Mango Lisa
items.description: Scoop of vanilla ice cream, cheesecake and mango ice cream topped with whipped cream.
items.englishDescription: Scoop of vanilla ice cream, cheesecake and mango ice cream topped with whipped cream.

items.name: Tiramesso 1
items.description: Vanilla ice cream, tiramisu, chocolate ice cream and 1 shot of espresso, topped with whipped cream.
items.englishDescription: Vanilla ice cream, tiramisu, chocolate ice cream and 1 shot of espresso, topped with whipped cream.

items.name: Tiramesso 2
items.description: Vanilla ice cream, tiramisu, strawberry, strawberry ice cream, Biscoff Lotus crumbs, whipped cream.
items.englishDescription: Vanilla ice cream, tiramisu, strawberry, strawberry ice cream, Biscoff Lotus crumbs, whipped cream.

items.name: Make Your Own Ice Cream Cup 😎
items.englishName: Make Your Own Ice Cream Cup 😎
items.description: Two scoops of ice cream with 3 toppings.
items.englishDescription: Two scoops of ice cream with 3 toppings.

items.name: Oreo sušenka
items.description: Naše domácí sušenka s belgickou čokoládou a drcenými Oreo, podávaná s kopečkem vanilkové zmrzliny.
items.englishDescription: Homemade cookie with Belgian chocolate and Oreo crumbs, served with vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Pistáciová sušenka
items.description: Naše domácí sušenka s pravou belgickou čokoládou, sypaná drcenými pistáciemi, podávaná s vanilkovou zmrzlinou.
items.englishDescription: Homemade cookie with Belgian chocolate and pistachios, served with vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Lotus sušenka
items.description: Naše domácí sušenka potřená jemným krémem Lotus Biscoff, sypaná drcenými sušenkami, podávaná s vanilkovou zmrzlinou.
items.englishDescription: Homemade cookie with Lotus and crumb, served with Biscoff spread and vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Sušenka Dubai čokoláda & marshmallow
items.description: Domácí sušenka s dubajskou čokoládou, sypaná drcenými pistáciemi a pistáciovou omáčkou, s belgickou čokoládou, kopečkem zmrzliny a marshmallow.
items.englishDescription: Cookie dough + Dubai chocolate base topped with soft marshmallows, baked until gooey, with pistachio sauce, pistachio crumbs and milk Belgian chocolate. 🍫✨

items.name: Dubai Chocolate Marshmallow (Vegetarian)
items.description: Rich Dubai chocolate base topped with soft marshmallows, pistachio sauce, pistachio crumbs and milk Belgian chocolate. 🍫✨
items.englishDescription: Rich Dubai chocolate base topped with soft marshmallows, pistachio sauce, pistachio crumbs and milk Belgian chocolate. 🍫✨

items.name: Ovocný salát
items.description: Lákavá kombinace banánu, kiwi, jahod a ananasu s Nutellou, dozdobená prameny bílé belgické čokolády.
items.englishDescription: Banana, kiwi, strawberry, pineapple and Nutella, drizzled with white Belgian chocolate.

items.name: Fondue pro jednoho
items.description: Fondue pro jednoho.
items.englishDescription: Fondue for one person.

items.name: Fondue pro 2-3
items.description: Fondue pro 2-3 lidi.
items.englishDescription: Fondue for 2-3 people.

items.name: Brownie
items.description: Pečené podle naší speciální receptury, zalité belgickou čokoládou podle vašeho výběru, podávané s kopečkem vanilkové zmrzliny.
items.englishDescription: Made with our special brownie recipe, covered with your choice of Belgian chocolate. Served with vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Brownie Burger
items.description: Burger z našich domácích brownies plněný jahodami, banánem a čokoládovou zmrzlinou, přelitý belgickou čokoládou podle vašeho výběru.
items.englishDescription: A brownie sandwich filled with strawberry, banana and chocolate ice cream, topped with your choice of Belgian chocolate.

items.name: Brownie Family
items.description: Výběr devíti našich domácích brownies v jedinečných kombinacích: bílá čokoláda & pistácie, hořká čokoláda & ořechy, Nutella & M&M's, Nutella & Kinder, Lotus Biscoff & sušenky, mléčná & mini marshmallows, mléčná & Rice Krispies, karamelová & čokoládové perličky, bílá čokoláda & Oreo.
items.englishDescription: A selection of nine brownies in unique combinations: white chocolate & pistachios, dark chocolate & nuts, Nutella & M&M's, Nutella & Kinder, Lotus Biscoff, milk chocolate & marshmallows, milk chocolate & Rice Krispies, caramel chocolate & pearls, white chocolate & Oreo.

items.name: Minimalistický smoothie
items.description: Jahoda, banán a jogurt.
items.englishDescription: Strawberry, banana and yogurt.

items.name: Vše žluté 💛💛
items.description: Ananas, mango, banán a jogurt.
items.englishDescription: Pineapple, mango, banana and yogurt.

items.name: Smoothie 3 bobule
items.description: Jahoda, malina, banán a jogurt.
items.englishDescription: Strawberry, raspberry, banana and yogurt.

items.name: Mátová limonáda
items.description: Domácí limonáda s mátou.
items.englishDescription: Home-made style lemonade with mint.

items.description: Home-made style lemonade with strawberry.
items.englishDescription: Home-made style lemonade with strawberry.

items.name: Raspberry Lemonade
items.description: Home-made style lemonade with raspberry.
items.englishDescription: Home-made style lemonade with raspberry.
